mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.AttendStdntMapper.selectByPk */ SELECT * FROM t_attend_stdnt WHERE edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and time_seq=#{timeSeq} and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.AttendStdntMapper.deleteByPk */ DELETE FROM t_attend_stdnt WHERE edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and time_seq=#{timeSeq} and user_id=#{userId}
